_readme: Your alert_feed.json must match this structure exactly. It is returned by the /get_alerts Flask endpoint in Sentio Mind. Do not add, remove, or rename any top-level key.

alerts._note_category: one of: SUDDEN_DROP / SUSTAINED_LOW / SOCIAL_WITHDRAWAL / HYPERACTIVITY_SPIKE / REGRESSION / GAZE_AVOIDANCE / ABSENCE_FLAG
alerts.title: Sudden wellbeing drop detected
alerts.description: Virat's wellbeing dropped from a baseline of 89.5 to 10.0 — a 79.5-point fall.
